id.description:
Unique identifier used to generate accessible IDs for labels and error
regions. Optional — a stable id is generated via `$props.id()` when omitted.

label.description: Visible legend rendered above the start/end inputs.

startLabel.description: Accessible label for the start date input. Defaults to "Start date".

endLabel.description: Accessible label for the end date input. Defaults to "End date".

granularity.description: Date-time precision. Defaults to day precision.

hidePresets.description: When true, hides the preset buttons and shows only the date inputs.

description.description: Helper text displayed below the field; wired via aria-describedby.

error.description:
Validation error message. When provided, marks both inputs as aria-invalid="true"
and renders the message in a live region.

disabled.description: Disables the entire field including presets and date inputs.

class.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the root element.

unsupportedProps.name: onchange
unsupportedProps.description: Called when the user changes the date range (preset or manual input).

unsupportedProps.name: presets
unsupportedProps.description:
Consumer-defined preset options shown above the date inputs.
Each preset has a label and a resolve() function that returns a DateRangeValue.
Defaults to today, yesterday-today, last-7d built-ins when omitted.

unsupportedProps.name: value
unsupportedProps.description: Current date range value. Bindable. Both fields start undefined when unset.
